description:
Responsibilities
1. Under the guidance of senior QA engineers, execute functional testing for the company’s products
2. Execute tests according to test cases, and identify and record software defects
3. Write test cases and test scripts, and participate in test case reviews
4. Participate in API testing, execute interface tests, and record test results
5. Participate in writing and executing automation test scripts
6. Participate in bug verification and confirm whether fixes are correctly resolved
7. Participate in regression testing to ensure product iterations do not introduce new issues
8. Write test reports, including testing progress, test results, and defect statistics
9. Continuously learn testing theories and techniques to improve testing capabilities
10. Collaborate with the team in using AI tools to support testing work
Requirements
Education & Experience:
- Associate degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related fields
- 0–2 years of software testing experience; fresh graduates are also welcome
- Strong interest in software testing and willingness to learn deeply
Testing Skills Requirements:
- Understanding of basic software testing theories and methods
- Understanding of test case design methods
- Ability to write clear test cases and test reports
- Understanding of defect management processes
Technical Fundamentals:
- Understanding of basic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- Understanding of APIs and HTTP protocols
- Basic knowledge of SQL and ability to perform simple database queries
- Basic knowledge of at least one programming language (such as Python or JavaScript)
- Basic knowledge of Git version control
Tool Usage Requirements:
- Ability to use mainstream browsers for web application testing
- Ability to use packet capture/proxy tools (such as Charles and Fiddler) for API debugging
- Ability to use Postman or similar tools for API testing
- Understanding of the basic use of defect management tools
Soft Skills:
- Good logical thinking and observation skills
- Good communication skills and ability to clearly describe problems
- Strong learning ability and curiosity
- Patience and attention to detail, with the ability to perform repetitive testing work
- Serious and responsible work attitude, with a strong sense of responsibility
- Good teamwork skills
Bonus Qualifications
- Learning or practical experience in automation testing
- Basic knowledge of performance testing or security testing
- Experience using AI tools to assist testing or work
- Experience with personal projects or internships
- Relevant computer-related certifications
- Familiarity with mobile internet product testing
